changes_from_v1: 1: Added 10-year income statement (Revenue → G&A → Net income → Dividend)
2: Added WCP Allocation & Sales Agreement placement fees ($90K Y1, $90K Y2 = $180K total at 6% × $3.0M)
3: Added fourth valuation method — P/E earnings valuation (× 10.72 per WCP V2 §1022)
4: Added explanatory note to Indicated FMV row (Line 26 equivalent) clarifying 2-method vs 4-method averaging
5: Updated holding-company discount from −15% to −20%; all values recalculated
6: Added P/E value / share (× 10.72) as second metric in Float Sale Scenarios A1 table
7: Corrected Scenario B — both scenarios now show 1,000,000 total shares; Scenario B reframed as treasury share resale
8: Added TSX Venture Exchange Tier 2 listing qualification table
9: Added Purpose section at top of document (two paragraphs: primary and secondary goals)
10: Added Appendix — Bencal SPVX DHS co-investment scenario (6 SPVX positions)
11: Added nominal consideration structure — $0.0001/share, total paid-in capital $100.00
Title updated to V2; version date 2026-06-11; removed 'Source: proforma engine BRIEF §5f'

founding_consideration.note: Uniform nominal consideration across all founding categories. Public float price determined by market capitalisation at time of sale.

nav_roll_forward.basis: Portfolio NAV = FVTPL market cap per IFRS 10.27; NAV/share = aggregate ÷ 1,000,000

income_statement.basis: FVTPL entity income statement. Portfolio FVTPL income = fair value remeasurement gain (pre-G&A, investment-entity convention). WCP fees are cash placement fee income recognized separately. G&A fixed at $45,000/year (light-office cost analysis). Y3 small loss funded from initial opex reserve.

wcp_allocation_agreement.rate: 6% placement fee on $3,000,000 WCP common shares

method_1_nav_per_share.label: Book value / NAV per share (primary)
method_1_nav_per_share.basis: Portfolio aggregate NAV ÷ 1,000,000 shares. IFRS 10.27 FVTPL.

method_2_earnings_yield.label: Earnings yield per share (portfolio FVTPL income ÷ 4.5% cap rate)
method_2_earnings_yield.basis: FVTPL remeasurement income per share ÷ 4.5% capitalization rate. Investment-entity convention. N/M = not meaningful.

method_3_pe_valuation.label: P/E earnings valuation (× 10.72)
method_3_pe_valuation.basis: FVTPL income per share × 10.72 P/E multiple (WCP V2 §1022). N/M in same years as Method 2.

method_4_nav_at_discount.label: NAV at −20% holding-company discount
method_4_nav_at_discount.basis: Method 1 × 0.80. Base case −20%; typical range 10–30% for illiquid Level-3 minority interests.

indicated_fmv_per_share.label: Indicated FMV / share (simple average, excl. N/M years)
indicated_fmv_per_share.basis: Simple unweighted average. Y0/Y2/Y3: Methods 1 and 4 only (2 applicable). Y1/Y4–Y10: all four methods.

scenario_a_float_sale.structure: Secondary market — Keil Capital and Elzen Holdings sell 105,000 existing shares each. Proceeds to sellers. Bencal financial statements unaffected.

a2_gradual_21k_per_year.note: Gradual provides liquidity staging; single Y10 IPO generates ~89% more total proceeds.

scenario_b_treasury_resale.structure: Keil Capital and Elzen Holdings each transfer 105,000 shares to Bencal Management Corp. treasury. Bencal resells these same 210,000 treasury shares to public investors at market price. Proceeds flow to Bencal treasury for SPV reinvestment. Total shares outstanding = 1,000,000 in both scenarios.

tsxv_compliance.note: Investment Issuer NTA minimum is $2,000,000 (vs. $750,000 for Industrial issuers). Classification is decisive.

option_1_expand_seller_float.description: Keil and Elzen each sell 250,000 shares (vs. 105,000 current plan)

tsxv_compliance.strategic_partner_note: Strategic Partner shares not yet allocated will be retained by Keil Capital and Elzen Holdings.

dhs_coinvestment_appendix.basis: Illustrative only. Bencal Management Corp. holds a 10% beneficial LP interest in each DHS, parallel to WCP's 10% ownership. Each interest held in an individual Bencal SPVX vehicle. NAV figures sourced from COMPLIANCE_MCorp_2026_06_04_Proforma_WCP_V2.html.

OPUS_A_ga_expenses.prompt_topic: G&A % for light holding company office
OPUS_A_ga_expenses.rationale: Cost stack is fixed compliance cost (audit/accounting/legal, D&O, regulatory filings, admin) — does not scale with SPV distribution income. Fixed floor more defensible than percentage for this entity type.

OPUS_B_second_scenario_metric.prompt_topic: Best second valuation metric for flow scenario table
OPUS_B_second_scenario_metric.label: P/E value / share (× 10.72)
OPUS_B_second_scenario_metric.reason: P/E tracks earnings power directly, stays interpretable across all scenario years, and captures the economic divergence between Scenario A (proceeds exit) and Scenario B (proceeds recapitalize Bencal). NAV/share and P/E provide orthogonal views — asset liquidation vs. income-generating capacity.

OPUS_C_tsxv_requirements.prompt_topic: TSX Venture Tier 2 listing requirements for an investment holding company
OPUS_C_tsxv_requirements.key_finding: Bencal classified as Investment Issuer (NTA minimum $2M, not $750K Industrial). Float minimum 500K free-trading shares (vs. 210K planned). Founding price $0.0001 requires restructuring before listing. EPS constraint non-binding.
OPUS_C_tsxv_requirements.source_note: Figures reflect published Tier 2 thresholds; confirm against TSXV Policy 2.1 in-force text for filing-grade use.

audit_trail_note: All numbers in this JSON are derivable from the V1 model NAV figures, OPUS research inputs, and the four formulas documented in valuation_methods. This file is intended for use by Ernst & Young as an auditable record of how all output numbers were generated.
